seoTitle: Mount Camel vs Mount Clear — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Camel and Mount Clear. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Camel vs Mount Clear: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Camel and Mount Clear.
heading: Mount Camel vs Mount Clear — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Camel, Victoria and Mount Clear, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Camel has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Mount Clear (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Camel or Mount Clear safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Camel has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Mount Clear scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Camel scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Clear scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Camel or Mount Clear?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Camel has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
